description: Composition Grey hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, hood with drawstrings, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs made of 97% cotton and 3% spandex, ribbed panels at the sides, two insert pockets with asymmetric openings, embroidered brand swoosh on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations A sportswear classic, this great sweatshirt from nike will form the backbone of your casual wardrobe and is a refreshing addition to your winter collection. The thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, the stylish ribbing gives you a strong sporty edge. Layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
